ham.subject: Quarterly Data Backup Complete – All Files Archived
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I am pleased to inform you that the scheduled quarterly data backup was successfully completed at 10:45 PM on Wednesday. All critical databases, production servers, and configuration files have been archived and are now safely stored in the primary backup repository.

No action is required on your part. Should you have any questions about the backup logs, please refer to the internal backup portal: <URL> or reach out to the IT Support Team.

Thank you for your cooperation and for continuously ensuring our data integrity.

Best regards,
Michael Alvarez
IT Operations Manager

spam.subject: URGENT: Your IT Account Suspended – Verify Immediately
spam.body:
Hello Employee,

Our security monitoring system has identified several unusual login attempts on your corporate IT account. In compliance with company policy, we have temporarily suspended your account to protect sensitive data.

To restore access, you must verify your identity by clicking the link below within the next 24 hours:

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent deletion of your account and could impact your employment status.

Please regard this as a high‑priority action. Contact the Corporate Security Team immediately if you have any concerns.

Regards,
Scott Henderson
Corporate Security Team
